title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Suven Pharmaceuticals

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Suven Pharmaceuticals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Suven Pharmaceuticals in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals:
Suven Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals!
